components.value: V, S, DF, M (oils worth 2,500 gp and a possession or piece of the body of the creature to resemble)

description.value: This spell functions as reincarnate except that you can cause the new body to resemble a particular creature, matching its age category and sex and rerolling any race result that would be the wrong size category. The subject further gains a +5 bonus on Disguise checks to impersonate the chosen creature due to similar features, although it might take a penalty for being the wrong race. The spell automatically leaves you with a small piece of the creature’s new body, typically a lock of hair (useful for scrying and other such spells).
